Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestTypes

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestTypes
public class TestTypes extends AbstractTests
Unit tests for Event-B type construction, conversion back and forth to strings and expressions, and translation to another factory.

  • Field Summary

    Description

    ENUM_SPEC

    Factory used to build types.

    ALL_VERSION_FACTORIES, BOOL_TYPE, EXT_CONS, EXT_HEAD, EXT_LIST, EXT_NIL, EXT_TAIL, ff, ffV1, INT_TYPE, LIST_DT, LIST_FAC, LIST_INT_TYPE, NO_BIDS, NO_EXPRS, NO_IDS, NO_PREDS, POW_LIST_INT_TYPE

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static void
    assertIllegalToTypeNotTypeChecked(String image)
     
    private static void
    assertIsNotATypeExpression(String image)
     
    private void
    assertNotType(String image)
     
    private void
    assertNotTypeTranslation(String image, FormulaFactory trg)
     
    private static void
    assertToTypeIllegal(Expression expr)
     
    private void
    assertTypeExpression(Type type, String image)
    Checks type conversion to Expression and getting back a type from the expression.
    private void
    assertTypeString(Type type, String image)
    Checks type conversion to String and parsing back from string.
    private void
    assertTypeTranslation(String image)
     
    private void
    checkType(Type type, String image)
     
    private IExpressionExtension
    findExtension(FormulaFactory fac, String symbol)
     
    private Type[]
    mTypes(FormulaFactory fac, String... images)
     
    void
    testIsATypeExpression()
    Ensures that an expression which is not a type is not advertised as a type.
    void
    testIsTranslatable()
    Ensures that a type, which cannot be translated to another factory, is properly identified as such and that attempting to translate it raises an exception.
    void
    testNotTypes()
    Ensures that an expression which does not look like a type cannot be parsed as type and is not advertised as a type.
    void
    testToTypeNotChecked()
    Ensures that, when calling toType() on expressions that are not type checked, IllegalStateException is thrown.
    void
    testTypeInequality()
    Ensures that the equality between types is not trivially wrong, by comparing types some of them.
    void
    testTypes()
    Ensures that types can be constructed and converted back and forth to strings and expressions.
    void
    testTypeTranslation()
    Ensures that a type, which can be translated to another factory, is properly translated.

    Methods inherited from class org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests

    assertFailure, assertSuccess, CPROD, parseAssignment, parseAssignment, parseAssignment, parseExpression, parseExpression, parseExpression, parsePredicate, parsePredicate, parsePredicate, parseType, parseType, POW, REL, typeCheck, typeCheck

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      private static final String ENUM_SPEC

      • Constant Field Values

    • tf

      private static final FormulaFactory tf
      Factory used to build types. Contains the classical List datatype and a simple enumerate with one value.

    • typenv

      private static final ITypeEnvironment typenv
